repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories address exactly the same symptom observed in the current failure: redefinition of a ge::op::Ca6k*Custom class in autogen/op_proto.h due to duplicate REG_OP macros or manual OP_ADD blocks. Each memory provides guidance on how to avoid this error—either by not adding a second REG_OP, by not including duplicate OP_ADD blocks in host_tiling_src, or by ensuring the operator description is kept intact. Since the current ca6k_00282 fails with 'redefinition of class ge::op::Ca6k00282Custom', these memories are directly applicable and offer complementary preventive strategies.
